result.summary: apitoolkit.io now points to Monoscope; discovered 1 REST API at https://api.monoscope.tech, 1 MCP server at https://api.monoscope.tech/api/v1/mcp, and the monoscope CLI, all using the same project-scoped API key from the dashboard.

monoscope_project_api_key.label: Monoscope project API key
monoscope_project_api_key.setup: Sign in at [Monoscope dashboard](https://app.monoscope.tech), then go to [Settings > API Keys](https://monoscope.tech/docs/dashboard/settings-pages/api-keys/) and click `Create an API key` / `Create API Key`. A key is generated automatically for a new project, and keys are project-scoped. Store it securely because docs say it is shown only once.
